example: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.
We should recycle paper, plastic, and glass.
Climate change is causing more extreme weather.
We need to protect our natural environment.
We must use natural resources wisely.

We produce too much plastic waste every day.
I try to use eco-friendly products.
Solar energy is a type of renewable energy.
Planting trees helps reduce carbon dioxide.
Driving less can reduce your carbon footprint.

vietnamese: loài có nguy cơ tuyệt chủng

example: We need to find sustainable ways to use energy.
